title: September 10th, 2021 (2)
body:
- you should have better posture
    - what do you mean?
- like this
- ::lifts from the top of their head so that their spine hangs long and easy::
    - no i mean what is better posture
- posture that helps you live longer and feel more comfortable
    - as an existential creature i'm pretty into both of those but i haven't made them core values
    - i going to reserve judgement on what's better after i process that very interesting information
- dialog graph
- laptop stolen
- encountering the limits of all our others magics, patience is our last most poweresponsible spell. just going to survive the integrated experience until there's more leisure time for other magic
    - that's why when we're operating from a fixed mindset we use our patience so sparingly. we constantly think we're about to need it so by default we use all of our more encumbered magics instead. exhausting ourselves if those magics are control heavy. dissipating ourselves when our magics are detachment heavy
- magic
    - the ability to operate intuitively in a projected space in a way that leads to inexplicably intentional impact
        - from the interior perspective this can look like the paradox of altering our interior experience by rearranging deck chairs
        - externally, the connection between actor and results, however externally mediated lacks substance, that it isn't real
        - from an integrated perspective, the same paradoxes and ensuing personal crises occur (we have no power in heaven after all) and our magic seems like simple human living (straight down the inertial path through our subjective life)
        - not everything we are is magic (though it is divine)
            - everything we do is magic. we only ever do magic and we never do anything that isn't magic
            - when someone says magic is frivolous so they don't touch the stuff, i would have you know that everything you hold dear is frivolous. and i love you
            - when someone says magic is corruptively powerful so they don't touch the stuff , i would say to you that your overcomp[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]mentalized relationship to power and responsibility is blinding you to the pollution generated by your disintegrated our poweresponsibility. and i love you
- don't take sick days take health days and make them deal with trying to take away your health space
- workplace rebellion
- anxiety to apathy
- i lyrics
    - aye aye captain
    - snappin two while inside i'm laughin at em
    - patch masking the side eye i'm castin at em
    - fishin cuz i can't fathom my life
    - deep in the lulls though asking why i'm a wise guy
    - when if i ever said i was right i lied
    - hi my name is just a byline
    - i've got a whale to catch
    - so that's what i do when i try
    - you could say i'm attached
    - wanna catch a ride write about whatever tails splash
    - so if i die trying they know i ain't fail cuz i'm about it
    - st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ed in a whole then i climbed up out it
    - now i'm alone with my soul and sometimes i doubt it
    - cuz when i get close enough to see it's i i see i'm surrounded still
    - bounded
    - bill don't
    - bill do
    - bank hard and toss a payload down it
    - before it kill you
    - high tide
    - its my time to put this rope back where i found it
    - let go the mast kept me from being grounded
    - all these years i couldn't be around cuz i was climbing mountains
    - before i knew how to come down em
    - i can see the sea is angry
    - i used to sleep in the sound
    - when i use it to hide it doesn't seem so loud in my mind
    - it's what keeps me out of the eye in the middle of the maelstrom
    - if i got a bow i'm trying fiddle the outcome
    - riddle the stars with questions to fashion a legend out of
    - to share with my sailors when i see em cuz it's a craft i'm proud of
    -
    - i'm only human
    - i got a thing that i'm doing
    - and when i see to it
    - i lose sight of the futile
    - so yeah you could say i'm mad
    - but i'm ahab
